meta.description:
Connect 4 is a well known vertical game played with "checkers" game pieces, although it is more akin to Tic-Tac-Toe or Go Moku.

The board is placed in the stand to hold it vertically and the players drop game pieces into one of the seven slots, each of which holds up to six game pieces, until one player succeeds in getting four in a row, whether horizontally, vertically, or diagonally.

The game is non-proprietary. More elegant, wooden versions can be found under the name The Captain's Mistress.
meta.wiki:
Online Play

  • Mindoku (real-time play, human opponents, ratings, tournaments)
  • Little Golem (turn-based)
  • Yucata (turn-based)
  • YourturnMyturn (turn-based)
  • Goldtoken.com (turn-based)
  • Gravon (real-time)
  • brettspielnetz.de (turnbased, German)
  • DevilPlay
  • farfarfar.com/games/connect_four (solitaire)
  • Iggamecenter (real-time, bot)
  • Playabstractgames.com (real-time, bot)
  • Brainking (turn based)
  • games.wtanaka.com/four (real-time or turn-based)
  • SkillGamesBoard (cross-platform, real-time play, human opponents, bots, turn-based for registered users)
Components:
  • Grid
  • 2 End Supports
  • 2 Checker Catcher Pieces
  • 18 Red Checkers
  • 18 Black Checkers
  • Retaining Lever
  • Instructions

Microbadges

- Connect 4 fan
